message:
✨ Add stat block click handlers to Dashboard, Compliance, HelmReleases

Add drill-down click handlers to stat blocks on:
- Dashboard (main): drill to cluster details (healthy/unhealthy)
- Compliance: drill to policy views (failing/critical findings)
- HelmReleases: prepare hook for future release drill-downs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
